mapper.select: select id, user_id, balance, invitees_number, referral_bonus_credits, is_deleted, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time from wallet_balance where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0
select balance from wallet_balance where is_deleted = 0 and user_id=#{userId}
mapper.insert: insert into wallet_balance(id,user_id, balance, invitees_number, referral_bonus_credits, is_deleted, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time) values (#{id},#{userId}, #{balance}, #{inviteesNumber}, #{referralBonusCredits}, #{isDeleted}, #{createUser}, #{updateUser}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})

insert into wallet_balance(id,user_id, balance, invitees_number, referral_bonus_credits, is_deleted, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time) values
(#{entity.id},#{entity.userId}, #{entity.balance}, #{entity.inviteesNumber}, #{entity.referralBonusCredits}, #{entity.isDeleted}, #{entity.createUser}, #{entity.updateUser}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.updateTime})

insert into wallet_balance(id,user_id, balance, invitees_number, referral_bonus_credits, is_deleted, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time) values
(#{entity.id},#{entity.userId}, #{entity.balance}, #{entity.inviteesNumber}, #{entity.referralBonusCredits}, #{entity.isDeleted}, #{entity.createUser}, #{entity.updateUser}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.updateTime})
on duplicate key update user_id = values(user_id), balance = values(balance), invitees_number = values(invitees_number), referral_bonus_credits = values(referral_bonus_credits), is_deleted = values(is_deleted), create_user = values(create_user), update_user = values(update_user), create_time = values(create_time), update_time = values(update_time)
